ShortDescription.Value: Boost extractor output with per-resource multipliers / 独立调节每种原材料的采集倍率

Publish.LongDescription:
# Extractor Boost
Boost raw resource output from all extractor buildings with individual per-resource multiplier sliders (1-10x).
## Supported Resources - **Agriculture**: Grain, Vegetables, Cotton, Livestock - **Mining**: Oil, Ore, Coal, Stone - **Forestry**: Wood - **Fishing**: Fish
## Features - Individual multiplier slider for each resource type - Settings persist across game sessions - Reset all multipliers to default with one click
---
# 采集倍率增强
为所有采集类建筑提供独立的产量倍率滑块（1-10倍），让你的城市不再为原材料供不应求而烦恼。
## 支持的资源 - **农业**: 谷物、蔬菜、棉花、畜牧 - **采矿**: 石油、矿石、煤炭、石材 - **林业**: 木材 - **渔业**: 鱼类
## 使用方式 - 每种资源拥有独立的倍率滑块 - 设置在游戏重启后自动保存 - 一键重置所有倍率至默认值
Publish.ChangeLog: - Added Fish resource support (Fishing category) - Added Chinese (Simplified/Traditional) localization for all settings - Added bilingual (EN/CN) mod description - 新增鱼类资源支持（渔业分类） - 新增设置界面中文翻译 - 新增中英双语mod说明
